name: video-player-toolkit
description: Hooks and components to build a YouTube-style video player: keyboard shortcuts, position-resume in localStorage, OSD overlay, speed picker, and a Continue-Watching carousel that reads from the resume store.

envVars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_VIDEO_RESUME_PREFIX
envVars.description: localStorage key prefix used by useVideoResume / readResumePositions / ContinueWatching. Default: video_resume_. Customise if multiple apps share the same browser origin.

postInstall: 1. Wrap your <video> with the hooks: const { videoRef, resumedFrom } = useVideoResume(item.id); const { osd } = usePlayerKeyboard(videoRef);
2. Position <PlayerOsd text={osd} /> absolutely inside the video container
3. <SpeedSelector videoRef={videoRef} /> goes anywhere below the player
4. ContinueWatching needs you to wire `fetchItems` to your own /api endpoint that takes ids and returns title/duration/thumbnailUrl
5. If you ship more than one app on the same origin, set NEXT_PUBLIC_VIDEO_RESUME_PREFIX so resume positions don't collide
